name: Multi-Asset Trend Following with ML Signal Enhancement
description: Traditional CTA trend following (EWMA crossover) augmented with a machine learning layer that predicts whether a trend signal will follow through or reverse. ML model ingests cross-asset correlations, macro regime indicators, VIX term structure, and COT positioning data.
core_logic: Base signals: EWMA fast(32) / slow(128) crossover. ML model (XGBoost or LSTM) scores signal quality 0-1. Final position = direction * ML_quality_score * vol_scaled_size.

sharpe_ratio.note: ML adds ~0.1-0.3 Sharpe vs pure trend

pros: Combines trend robustness with ML refinement
signal_buy: EWMA fast > slow AND ML quality score > threshold
signal_sell: EWMA fast < slow AND ML quality score > threshold
